# dotdev

> Personal dotfiles + AI coding-agent environment for macOS (pi/Claude Code/Codex), managed with GNU Stow. Guardian-gated hook pipeline, ~95 shared agent skills, hunk/openwiki/delta review tooling.

Repo: https://github.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev

## Core entry points

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/README.md): Repo structure, Stow layout, quick start.
- [AI_ENVIRONMENT.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/AI_ENVIRONMENT.md): How the toolchain fits together — pi + Claude Code, the guardian hook pipeline (PreToolUse/PostToolUse), the skills library.
- [SETUP_WRITEUP.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/SETUP_WRITEUP.md): Full narrative setup history and rationale.
- [dotfiles/.claude/CLAUDE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/dotfiles/.claude/CLAUDE.md): OMC (oh-my-claudecode) orchestration config — agent routing, model tiers, skill triggers.
- [dotfiles/.claude/SKILLS-MAP.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/dotfiles/.claude/SKILLS-MAP.md): Cheat sheet — "when you want to do X, invoke Y" across the ~95-skill library.

## Installation

- [install.sh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/install.sh): Stow-based install entrypoint.
- [docs/INSTALLATION.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/INSTALLATION.md): Detailed setup instructions.
- [Brewfile](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/Brewfile): Package dependencies (Homebrew).
- [scripts/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/scripts/): Setup scripts (ai-setup, herdr-setup, github, security-init, config-init).

## Configuration

- [docs/APPLICATIONS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/APPLICATIONS.md): App-specific settings.
- [docs/MACOS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/MACOS.md): System preferences.
- [docs/SHELL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/SHELL.md): ZSH setup and customization.
- [dotfiles/.config/hunk/USAGE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/dotfiles/.config/hunk/USAGE.md): Hunk diff-review tool — our config, commands, agent-session protocol.
- [dotfiles/.config/agents/docs/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/dotfiles/.config/agents/docs/): Agent-agnostic shared reference docs (e.g. PR sizing policy).

## Security

- [docs/SECURITY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/SECURITY.md): Secret scanning, git security hooks, environment safety checks.
- [.gitleaks.toml](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/.gitleaks.toml): Gitleaks scanner config.
- [.pre-commit-config.yaml](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/.pre-commit-config.yaml): Pre-commit hook configuration.

## Testing

- [docs/TESTING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/TESTING.md): Test suite overview.
- [test/run-tests.sh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/test/run-tests.sh): Bash test runner entrypoint.

## History

- [docs/decision-log.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/decision-log.md): Running log of environment decisions and why.
- [docs/audits/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/audits/): Periodic repo/setup audits.
- [docs/research/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/research/): Investigation writeups (token efficiency, install proofs, wiring verification).

## Optional

- [docs/executions/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/docs/executions/): Point-in-time execution/refactor plans.
- [herdr-plugins/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/johnalexwelch/dotdev/main/herdr-plugins/): herdr worktree-orchestration plugins.
